description: Create a new campaign 'SEN_WEST' by cloning the existing 'SENPOLL' campaign. The new campaign must inherit all tuning parameters from 'SENPOLL' but require the following specific settings: Campaign ID 'SEN_WEST', Campaign Name 'Senate Polling West', Active 'Y', Campaign CallerID '3105550199', and Manual Dial Prefix '9'. Access the Vicidial Admin system using credentials User: 6666, Pass: andromeda.
